description: A client is configured with two ordered registry sources: source A (listed first, preferred by order) and source B (listed second). Both serve a waiveo/settings entry, but only source B's configured signing key-id chains to the waiveo first-party publisher delegation -- source A's key-id is bound in client config to an ordinary third-party delegation only. Source order must never substitute for trust: the reserved-namespace entry from source A is refused despite being first in the list, while the same pack_id resolved from source B is accepted.
